title: Selling Stock Photos Without PayPal: Which Option Actually Works for You — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: You're a talented photographer from Nigeria, with a passion for capturing life's beauty. However, when you try to sell your stock photos online, you hit a roadblock – PayPal and Stripe won't let you use their services due to your country's restrictions. This means you're locked out of using platforms like Shutterstock, iStock, and Adobe Stock, which are popular gateways for selling stock photos. You're not alone; many creatives in Nigeria and other restricted countries face this same frustration. The question is, what can you do to get your photos in front of potential buyers and get paid for your work?
What Each Option Actually Offers

Let's take a closer look at the alternatives. Gumroad, for instance, is a popular platform for selling digital products, but it has its own set of limitations, including a 3.5% + $0.30 fee on each sale. Payhip is another option, but it charges a 2.9% + $0.30 fee and requires a PayPal or Stripe account. Meanwhile, NOWPayments offers instant, fee-free transactions in over 300 cryptocurrencies, making it an attractive option for creators who want to bypass traditional payment processors altogether. The Full Stack Bundle from Unchained Commerce provides a comprehensive solution, including automated delivery, payment verification, and a customizable frontend, all without the need for a PayPal or Stripe account.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

When it comes to restricted countries, Gumroad and Payhip are often at a loss, forcing creators to rely on manual workarounds or giving up altogether. NOWPayments, on the other hand, is designed to work seamlessly with creators from anywhere in the world, without the need for KYC or other cumbersome verification processes. The Full Stack Bundle takes this a step further, providing a complete infrastructure for creators to sell their products without relying on traditional payment processors, which are often blocked in these countries. This means you can focus on what you do best – creating – without worrying about payment processing headaches.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

When it comes to payment speed and fees, NOWPayments stands out as a clear winner. With instant transactions and zero fees, you can get paid quickly and efficiently, without worrying about deductions or surprise charges. The Full Stack Bundle takes this a step further, providing a customizable frontend and automated delivery capabilities, all without the need for a PayPal or Stripe account. This means you can focus on growing your business, without worrying about payment processing costs or speed.
Gumroad and Payhip may seem like convenient options, but they come with their own set of limitations and fees.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

Automation is key when it comes to delivering products to customers quickly and efficiently. The Full Stack Bundle provides a complete infrastructure for automation, including automated delivery, payment verification, and customizable frontend options. This means you can focus on creating new products, without worrying about the technical details of delivery. NOWPayments also offers automated payment processing, making it easy to get paid quickly and efficiently. With these tools at your disposal, you can focus on growing your business, without worrying about the logistics of payment processing.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

So, which option is right for you? If you're looking for a simple, fee-free payment solution, NOWPayments may be the way to go. However, if you need a more comprehensive solution, including automation and customizable frontend options, the Full Stack Bundle from Unchained Commerce may be a better fit. Either way, you can rest assured that you're getting a payment processing solution that's designed to work for creators like you, without the need for KYC or other cumbersome verification processes.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The good news is that you don't have to rely on PayPal or Stripe to sell your stock photos. With NOWPayments and the Full Stack Bundle from Unchained Commerce, you can get paid quickly and efficiently, without worrying about payment processing headaches. The key is to choose the right solution for your needs, and to focus on what you do best – creating high-quality stock photos that people want to buy.
NOWPayments and the Full Stack Bundle provide a more comprehensive solution for creators who want to bypass traditional payment processors.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're looking for more ways to monetize your stock photos, you may want to consider selling them on other platforms, such as Shutterstock or iStock. However, with the Full Stack Bundle, you can create your own customizable storefront and sell your photos directly to customers, without relying on intermediaries. Your Action Checklist

To get started with selling your stock photos without PayPal, follow these concrete action steps: 1) Sign up for a NOWPayments account or purchase the Full Stack Bundle from Unchained Commerce. 2) Set up your customizable storefront and upload your stock photos. 3) Configure your payment processing options, including automated delivery and payment verification. 4) Promote your products to potential customers through social media, email marketing, or other channels. 5) Focus on creating high-quality products and providing excellent customer service to build a loyal customer base. By following these steps, you can get started with selling your stock photos and start building a successful online business.
